summary: Tested three bug fixes for LawFlow: (1) No fake Welcome notification on fresh account, (2) Global Search removed from More tab Tools section, (3) Firm members show advocate name not phone number. All three fixes verified via backend API tests (3/3 pass) and Playwright UI tests.

FIX1_no_welcome_notification.evidence: Notifications screen shows 'You're all caught up / No new notifications'. 'Welcome to LawFlow' text NOT present. buildNotifications() in AppContext.tsx confirmed to only use hearing-based notifications.
FIX1_no_welcome_notification.code_check: buildNotifications() at line 243 has no static push — only HEARING_REMINDER and MISSED_HEARING from actual hearing data

FIX2_global_search_removed.evidence: [data-testid='menu-search'] NOT present in DOM. 'Global Search' text NOT in page. All other TOOLS items present: Bulk Reminders, Analytics, Message Templates, Notifications
FIX2_global_search_removed.code_check: more.tsx TOOLS section confirmed: no MenuRow with testID='menu-search'

FIX3_firm_members_show_name.evidence: Firm screen Members section shows 'Adv. Rahul Sharma' as primary text, 'Owner · Joined 3/9/2026' as secondary. Phone 9876543210 NOT shown as member label. API GET /api/firms/my returns members[0].name='Adv. Rahul Sharma'
FIX3_firm_members_show_name.code_check: firms.py enriches members with name from advocates collection. firm.tsx renders m.name || m.phone

context_for_next_testing_agent: All three bug fixes from this iteration are working correctly. Firm 'Sharma and Associates' exists for user 9876543210 with owner 'Adv. Rahul Sharma'. Login: phone=9876543210, OTP=123456.
